title: StarlightPack
body:
Have you ever wanted to transform the minecraft interface into the style of stars and space? so, this resource pack will do it!
So, ahem, ahem... 

Changes: 

The interface has been changed in a dark blue style. 

the color of the text in the workbench and so on has turned yellow. 

The hearts on the health bar turned yellow. 

Hunger icons have been replaced with golden carrots. 

The background in the main menu has been replaced with a space painting. 

and some minor changes that don't need to be told.
